arts.ttl: I'm John McGinn's cousin who was slammed for X-rated Rangers tackle - my boss BOOED me and Celtic fans called me a legend
arts.sum: Football runs in the family for Scotland hero John McGinn with cousin Kieran Gibbons joining brothers Stephen and Paul in having played professionally

arts.ttl: Liverpool discover final Ibrahima Konate red card verdict after Wolves controversy
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Mark Wakefield, Matthew Abbott, Isaac Seelochan, Kieran Horn)
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as ECHO writers debate whether or not Ibrahima Konate should have been sent off in the win over Wolves

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah to trigger 'HISTORIC' transfer window
arts.sum: Liverpool are expected to back Arne Slot in the transfer market this summer and Mohamed Salah ’s potential exit could trigger a "historic" few months of spending. However, TEAMtalk have claimed that his exit could trigger potentially the biggest summer transfer window in Liverpool’s history.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'preparing to tempt' Newcastle with audacious Alexander Isak swap deal
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly preparing to tempt Newcastle United with an audacious swap deal for prolific striker Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: Luis Diaz sends message to Mo Salah as he lifts lid on Arne Slot and Liverpool dressing room
arts.sum: Liverpool forward Luis Diaz doesn't want to see Mohamed Salah leave the club this summer - but he's going to enjoy every bit of playing alongside him here and now

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Liverpool interested in signing Hugo Ekitike
arts.sum: Premier League giants Arsenal and Liverpool are both interested in signing Eintracht Frankfurt centre-forward Hugo Ekitike (22), according to Foot Mercato. Earlier today, RMC Sport previously reported that the France U21 international…

arts.ttl: What Liverpool are missing out on during title race as 'bad moments' warned
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Andy Robertson admits it is 'never straightforward' when challenging for the Premier League title

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs. Liverpool: Unai Emery's side looking to end 21-year streak in Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be looking to end a 21-year streak when they square off against Liverpool in the Premier League on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery gearing up for Aston Villa’s demanding fixture list
arts.sum: Villa are in the midst of five games in 14 days and welcome Liverpool to Villa Park on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs. Liverpool: Unai Emery describes Premier League clash as "biggest challenge"
arts.sum: Head coach Unai Emery insists that Aston Villa's Premier League fixture against Liverpool on Wednesday night will represent their "biggest challenge" of the season.
